name: Baked Oatmeal
recipeIngredient: 2 eggs, or Ener-g egg replacer equivalent
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix the dry ingredients (oatmeal, brown sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, salt) in a large bowl.
3. Mix the wet ingredients (applesauce, vanilla, eggs or egg replacer, rice milk) in another bowl.
4. Stir together the wet and dry ingredients until just combined.
5. Fold in the raisins or blueberries.
6. Pour the mixture into a lightly sprayed 9x9 pan.
7. Bake for 20-30 minutes.
8. Serve as-is, or top with some milk.
Notes: This recipe yields a cake-like texture. Using 1/2 cup of sugar resulted in a sweeter taste; you may want to reduce it next time. Egg replacer and rice milk were successfully used as substitutes. Soy milk could also work well. The original recipe suggested adding nuts, but this increases the fat content, so they were omitted for simplicity.
